core_principles: Speed & Legibility: Captains and Kitchen staff operate in high-pressure environments; large touch targets and high-contrast text are critical.
Organic Warmth: Moving away from sterile, 'tech-bro' POS systems. Utilizing terracotta and sage tones to reflect culinary craft, hospitality, and warmth.
Density where needed: KDS and Admin panels must use 'Control Room' grid rules (tight gaps, full height utilization).
Optical Alignment: Ensure all icons inside buttons are perfectly centered with text.

rules: NEVER use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings.
Use IBM Plex Sans for tables, numbers, and dense information to maintain tabular figure clarity.
Always set text color explicitly on hover states.

layout_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12). Generous padding for surfaces (min p-6).

grids.kds: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 (Control Room Grid). Height strictly matched (h-full).
grids.billing: grid-cols-12 gap-6. Main content col-span-8, receipt col-span-4.

surfaces_and_materials.cards: Flat solid backgrounds (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-[#E0DBD3]), soft custom shadow.
surfaces_and_materials.active_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-0.5) and deeper shadow. For KDS tickets: glowing border on 'Rush' orders.
surfaces_and_materials.glassmorphism: Only for Captain app sticky bottom-bar (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/80 border-t border-[#E0DBD3]). DO NOT use for heavy data panels.

captain_app.features: Sticky bottom navigation and 'View Cart' bar. Quick +/- quantity buttons.

kitchen_display_kds.features: Color-coded headers based on wait time (Green < 10m, Yellow 10-20m, Red > 20m). Large 'Bump/Done' button.

billing_dashboard.layout: Desktop wide. Left panel: Active tables/Orders. Right panel: Live bill calculation.
billing_dashboard.features: Clear, tabular breakdown of taxes, discounts, and totals.

admin_panel.features: Use Shadcn Table. No generic cards wrapping tables—let tables breathe with 1px border.

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary buttons must use #C25934 background with white text. Apply optical alignment.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Subtle background (#F2EFE9), 1px border. High contrast on focus.
components.modals: Shadcn Dialog. Deep backdrop blur overlay (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm).
components.toast: Use Sonner. Ensure toasts appear at top-center for Kitchen, bottom-center for Captain app.

icons.rules: Use for navigation, quick actions, and status indicators. Keep stroke width consistent (1.5px or 2px).

images.rules: Main agent MUST use these URLs for placeholders. DO NOT use generic placeholder services.

categories.description: Minimalist logo for the auth/login screens
Warm organic texture for login screen background split

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings. Implement 'Work Sans' and 'IBM Plex Sans' via Google Fonts.
Implement the 4 distinct views: Captain (Mobile-first Menu/Cart), KDS (Grid of tickets), Billing (Split screen), Admin (Tables).
Use standard HTML tags (div, section) styled with Tailwind for main layouts; reserve Shadcn components for complex interactions (Dialog, Select, Tabs).
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cart items) include data-testid attributes for testing (e.g., data-testid='place-order-btn').
Mock real-time updates and backend integration in the MVP via state or context for now, highlighting 'mocked' functionality where necessary.
For KDS: Use 'Control Room' grid layout. Set parent grid with gap-4 and make sure ticket cards have h-full.
For Captain App: Implement generous spacing (p-6/p-8) for touch targets to avoid mis-taps during a lunch rush.
Contrast check: Ensure text on the primary button color (#C25934) is white. Do not rely on default gray inheritance.
Avoid generic borders. Tint borders to the warm tone (#E0DBD3).
DO NOT use full-screen gradients. Keep the UI mostly solid #F9F8F6 (Bone White) with white cards.
